web.title: How to hide your root status using MagiskHide and other tools
web.description: Androidsis » Tutorials » Android Root How to hide your root status using MagiskHide and other tools Rooting offers full control of the mobile phone, but many banking, payment, and gaming apps block it upon detection. Magisk and MagiskHide allow "system-less" rooting and hide root access to specific apps while maintaining advanced features.

web.title: Hide Magisk Root (Bank Apps, SafetyNet, Play Integrity)
web.description: This guide helps advanced root users hide root access from banking apps, SafetyNet, and Play Integrity checks using Magisk Alpha and modules like Hide My Applist, RootCloak, and Tricky Store Addon.

web.description: Are your banking apps not opening because of root access? Discover how to hide it with Magisk, Shamiko, and other tricks to bypass SafetyNet and Play Integrity.
